labels.notes: Trevor Emery — sinusitis + opioid tapering + PRP discussion. Production incorrectly added K030A (Diabetic Management) with no diabetes mention — false positive. v0.10.30 evidence validation should suppress K030A. Production dx 460 (nasopharyngitis) is secondary; 304 (drug dependence) is more appropriate for opioid tapering. Also note: opioid_withdrawal_management ConditionType added in v0.10.30 to fix the initial extraction failure.
